name: Snackbar
description: A snackbar gives brief, low-priority feedback about an action just taken — "Vehicle saved", "Export started" — usually with a single optional action like Undo. Built from @mui/material/Snackbar, which by default renders a SnackbarContent (dark surface) driven by the `message`/`action` props, or a fully custom `children` element (e.g. an Alert).
keyRule: Use a snackbar for transient confirmation that doesn't need acknowledgement. For a message that must persist until acted on, use a Banner; for a blocking choice, a Dialog. Auto-dismiss is opt-in (`autoHideDuration`), not automatic.

variants.name: With action
variants.whenToUse: Offer a quick follow-up (Undo, View) — set `action` alongside `message`.

variants.name: Custom content
variants.whenToUse: Replace SnackbarContent entirely via `children`, e.g. to render an Alert for an error toast; pair persistent errors with a Banner instead of relying on this.

anatomy.name: Root
anatomy.description: positions the snackbar per `anchorOrigin` — MUI's real `root` slot.

anatomy.name: SnackbarContent
anatomy.description: the default dark surface rendered from `message`/`action` — MUI's real `content` slot; swap it out entirely via `children`.

anatomy.name: Message
anatomy.description: one concise line of text, from the `message` prop.

anatomy.name: Action
anatomy.description: at most one action element (e.g. an Undo Button), from the `action` prop.

behaviors.name: Auto-dismiss is opt-in
behaviors.description: `autoHideDuration` defaults to `null` — nothing auto-hides unless you set it (e.g. 4000–6000ms). When set, hovering/focusing pauses the timer automatically (and disableWindowBlurListener controls whether it also pauses when the window loses focus).

behaviors.name: One at a time
behaviors.description: Show a single snackbar; queue subsequent ones yourself (e.g. via notistack or your own queue) rather than stacking multiple Snackbar instances.

behaviors.name: Single action
behaviors.description: At most one action; don't put critical, irreversible choices behind a transient surface's action.

states.treatment: Dark surface (SnackbarContent default), light text, optional action.
Whatever hover/focus state the action Button itself provides; visible focus.
Grow transition out (MUI's real default transition) after `onClose` sets `open` to false.

specs.value: SnackbarContent's real default: dark grey background / white text (semantic.color.surface.inverse / .onInverse), passes AA
Not a built-in — style the action Button yourself; semantic.color.brand.primary.light (#FFA863) is legible on the dark surface
Inherits the app-wide default Typography variant (body2, 14px)
No default auto-hide (`autoHideDuration` is null); set ~4000–6000ms yourself, longer if there's an action
Default anchorOrigin { vertical: 'bottom', horizontal: 'left' } — override for bottom-center etc.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the snackbar is shown. Default false — always pass this as a controlled value in practice.

props.name: message
props.description: One concise line of text, e.g. "Vehicle saved" — rendered by the default SnackbarContent.

props.name: action
props.description: At most one action element (e.g. an Undo Button), rendered after the message by the default SnackbarContent.

props.name: autoHideDuration
props.description: Milliseconds before onClose is called automatically. Default null (no auto-dismiss) — opt-in, not automatic.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called on timeout, a click away, or Escape. Check `reason` if you want to ignore 'clickaway'.

props.name: anchorOrigin
props.description: Where the snackbar is positioned. Default { vertical: 'bottom', horizontal: 'left' }.

props.name: children
props.description: Fully replaces the default SnackbarContent — e.g. render an Alert instead.

props.name: resumeHideDuration
props.description: Milliseconds to wait after user interaction before dismissing again. Defaults to autoHideDuration / 2 if autoHideDuration is set.

props.name: disableWindowBlurListener
props.description: If true, the autoHideDuration timer keeps running even when the window loses focus. Default false.

props.name: sx
props.description: Standard MUI system prop for one-off style overrides.

doThis: Keep the message to one short line.
Offer at most one action (e.g. Undo).
Queue snackbars yourself; show one at a time.
Set an explicit autoHideDuration — it doesn't auto-dismiss by default.
dontDoThis: Don't use a snackbar for errors that need action — use a Banner/Dialog.
Don't rely on a default timeout that doesn't exist — always set autoHideDuration if you want auto-dismiss.
accessibility: MUI renders the SnackbarContent as a polite live region by default; use `children` with role="alert" if a message needs assertive announcement.
If there's an action, autoHideDuration pauses automatically on hover/focus so it stays reachable.
The action should be a real Button with an accessible name.
